title: A Heart Full of Hope
overview: In Willow Creek, sisters Whitney and Lynette face the challenges of Whitney's kidney failure together. As Whitney pursues her college dream, a kind teacher, Sebastian, is inspired by her strength. When he offers to donate his kidney, his selfless act sparks hope, love, and a life-saving donor chain that transforms their community.
